LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-16-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CORBRO LLC DBA STEVENS CREEK VOLKSWAGEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. THE GEGAMYAN DECLARATION SHOWS THAT THE PARTIES FAILED TO MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON, BY VIDEO CONFERENCE, OR BY TELEPHONE. (CCP 430.41.) THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY FEBRUARY 16, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2025 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2024 Set For Trial On Aug-11-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CORBRO LLC DBA STEVENS CREEK VOLKSWAGEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. The Gegamyan declaration shows that the parties failed to meet and confer in person, by video conference, or by telephone. (CCP 430.41.) The parties are ordered to comply with the code. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by February 16, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
